controls.title: Data Provenance Tracking
controls.description: All datasets used for ML training must have documented provenance including source, collection method, date, and responsible party.

controls.title: Cryptographic Data Integrity
controls.description: All training datasets must have cryptographic hashes (SHA-256 or stronger) recorded at time of acquisition and verifiable at time of use.

controls.title: Data access control enforcement
controls.description: Enforce role-based access control on all ML data stores

controls.title: Input validation and sanitization
controls.description: Validate all data inputs against defined schemas and ranges

controls.title: PII/PHI detection in training data
controls.description: Detect and handle personally identifiable information in training data

controls.title: Data Lineage Documentation
controls.description: All data transformations, preprocessing steps, and augmentations applied to training data must be documented and reproducible.

controls.title: Secure data storage
controls.description: Store ML data in secure, access-controlled environments

controls.title: Data encryption at rest
controls.description: Encrypt all ML data at rest using AES-256 or equivalent

controls.title: Data encryption in transit
controls.description: Encrypt all ML data in transit using TLS 1.2+

controls.title: Data minimization
controls.description: Collect only data necessary for the intended ML purpose

controls.title: Training data quality checks
controls.description: Automated quality validation of training data before use

controls.title: Data retention policy
controls.description: Define and enforce data retention and disposal schedules

controls.title: Data labeling security
controls.description: Secure data labeling workflows to prevent label manipulation

controls.title: Cross-contamination prevention
controls.description: Prevent data leakage between training, validation, and test sets

controls.title: Data de-identification
controls.description: Remove or mask sensitive identifiers from training data

controls.title: Consent and rights management
controls.description: Ensure data usage complies with consent and data rights

controls.title: Data distribution analysis
controls.description: Analyze data distributions to detect anomalies and drift

controls.title: Data corruption detection
controls.description: Detect corrupted, malformed, or incomplete data records

controls.title: Differential Privacy for Distributed Training
controls.description: In federated or distributed training settings, differential privacy (DP) must be applied to model updates before sharing. The privacy budget (epsilon, delta) must be tracked across all training rounds and participants.

controls.title: Cryptographic Data Provenance
controls.description: Full cryptographic provenance chain using signed manifests or transparency logs for all training datasets.

controls.title: Federated data governance
controls.description: Enable cross-organization data governance for federated ML

controls.title: Secure multi-party computation
controls.description: Enable collaborative ML training without exposing raw data

controls.title: Secure Aggregation Verification
controls.description: In federated learning, the aggregation protocol must prevent the central server from inspecting individual participant model updates. Use homomorphic encryption, secure multi-party computation (SMPC), or trusted execution environments (TEEs).

controls.title: Automated data poisoning detection
controls.description: Automated detection of poisoned training data samples

controls.title: Adversarial data filtering
controls.description: Filter adversarial or manipulated samples from training data

controls.title: Real-time Data Integrity Monitoring
controls.description: For continuous learning systems, data integrity must be monitored in real-time during the data ingestion pipeline.

controls.title: Data usage auditing
controls.description: Audit all data access and usage for compliance

controls.title: Cross-border data compliance
controls.description: Ensure data handling complies with cross-border regulations

controls.title: Synthetic data validation
controls.description: Validate quality and representativeness of synthetic training data

controls.title: Data Trust Scoring
controls.description: Each data source must be assigned a trust score based on provenance completeness, historical integrity, and source reputation.

controls.title: ML System Inventory
controls.description: Complete inventory of all ML systems in the organization must be maintained.

controls.title: ML Risk Assessment Requirement
controls.description: All ML systems must undergo security risk assessment before production deployment.

controls.title: ML Security Policy
controls.description: Organization must have an ML-specific security policy approved by management.

controls.title: Data Governance Policy
controls.description: Data governance policy must cover ML-specific data considerations.

controls.title: Model Documentation (Model Cards)
controls.description: Each ML model must have a model card documenting its purpose, limitations, and performance.

controls.title: Incident Response Plan
controls.description: Incident response plan must cover ML-specific compromise scenarios.

controls.title: Bias Evaluation Requirement
controls.description: All ML models must undergo bias evaluation before deployment.

controls.title: Model Performance Monitoring
controls.description: Model performance must be monitored with fairness metrics tracked alongside accuracy.

controls.title: Audit Logging for ML Decisions
controls.description: All ML-driven decisions must be logged with sufficient context for audit.

controls.title: Third-Party AI Risk Assessment
controls.description: Third-party AI/ML services must undergo security assessment before use.

controls.title: AI Ethics Board
controls.description: Organization must have an AI ethics board or equivalent oversight body.

controls.title: Human-in-the-Loop for Critical Decisions
controls.description: Critical decisions driven by ML must require human review and approval.

controls.title: Continuous Compliance Monitoring
controls.description: Compliance must be monitored continuously through automated controls.

controls.title: External Audit Readiness
controls.description: ML systems must be ready for external audit at all times.

controls.title: EU AI Act Conformity Assessment
controls.description: High-risk ML systems must meet EU AI Act conformity requirements.

controls.title: Regular Red Team Exercises
controls.description: ML systems must undergo regular adversarial red team testing.

controls.title: Bias Continuous Monitoring
controls.description: Real-time bias detection with automated alerting on fairness drift.

controls.title: Transparency Reporting
controls.description: ML system transparency reports must be published for external stakeholders.

controls.title: Regulatory Filing Automation
controls.description: Automated generation of regulatory filings for ML systems.

controls.title: ML System Impact Assessment
controls.description: Impact assessments must be conducted for high-risk ML systems covering societal, privacy, fairness, and safety impacts.

controls.title: Model Serving Network Segmentation
controls.description: Model serving infrastructure must be on a separate network segment from general infrastructure.

controls.title: Inference Endpoint Authentication
controls.description: All inference endpoints must require authentication before processing requests.

controls.title: Inference Endpoint Authorization
controls.description: Authorization must enforce per-user or per-role access limits.

controls.title: TLS for Model Endpoints
controls.description: All inference traffic must be encrypted in transit.

controls.title: GPU/Compute Isolation
controls.description: GPU and compute resources must be isolated between model replicas and tenants.

controls.title: Model Cache Security
controls.description: Model inference caches must not leak data between users.

controls.title: Inference Request Logging
controls.description: All inference requests must be logged for audit and monitoring purposes.

controls.title: Batch Inference Security
controls.description: Batch inference jobs must be secured with access controls.

controls.title: API Rate Limiting
controls.description: Rate limiting must be configured per user/API key to prevent extraction and DoS.

controls.title: Input Size Validation
controls.description: Input payload size must be validated to prevent resource exhaustion.

controls.title: API Versioning
controls.description: API versions must be maintained with a deprecation policy.

controls.title: Model Health Monitoring
controls.description: Basic health monitoring must be implemented for model endpoints.

controls.title: Adversarial Input Detection at Inference
controls.description: Real-time detection of adversarial inputs during inference.

controls.title: Runtime Model Behavior Monitoring
controls.description: Runtime monitoring must detect anomalous model behavior.

controls.title: Automated Model Rollback on Anomaly
controls.description: Automated rollback to previous model version when anomalies are detected.

controls.title: Side-Channel Attack Prevention
controls.description: Mitigations for side-channel attacks on model inference.

controls.title: Confidential Computing for Inference
controls.description: Sensitive inference workloads should use confidential computing.

controls.title: Real-time Drift Monitoring
controls.description: Model drift (data distribution and concept drift) must be monitored in real-time.

controls.title: ML-Specific SIEM Integration
controls.description: ML security events must feed into SIEM for correlation and analysis.

controls.title: Dedicated ML Incident Response Playbook
controls.description: Specialized incident response playbook for ML security incidents.

controls.title: Continuous Penetration Testing
controls.description: Model APIs must undergo regular penetration testing.

controls.title: Hardware-Rooted Model Attestation
controls.description: Hardware-based attestation that verified models are running in trusted environments.

controls.title: Prompt Injection Prevention
controls.description: LLM applications must implement defenses against prompt injection attacks including direct, indirect, and multi-turn variants.

controls.title: Input/Output Boundary Enforcement
controls.description: Clear separation between system instructions, user input, and retrieved context must be maintained.

controls.title: Output validation and filtering
controls.description: Validate and filter LLM outputs before rendering or execution

references.owasp: LLM02 (Insecure Output Handling), LLM06 (Sensitive Information Disclosure)

controls.title: System Prompt Isolation
controls.description: The system prompt (base instructions) must be isolated from user input to prevent extraction or override.

controls.title: Context window limits
controls.description: Enforce maximum context window size

controls.title: Sensitive data exfiltration prevention
controls.description: Prevent LLM from outputting API keys, credentials, or PII

references.owasp: LLM02 (Insecure Output Handling), LLM06 (Sensitive Information Disclosure)

controls.title: Content filtering pipeline
controls.description: Deploy content moderation to block policy-violating outputs

references.owasp: LLM02 (Insecure Output Handling), LLM06 (Sensitive Information Disclosure)

controls.title: Human-in-the-loop for critical actions
controls.description: Require human approval for destructive or irreversible LLM actions

controls.title: Rate limiting on LLM endpoints
controls.description: Enforce per-user request rate limits on LLM APIs

controls.title: Token usage monitoring
controls.description: Monitor and alert on abnormal token consumption patterns

controls.title: Input token limits
controls.description: Enforce maximum input token count per request

controls.title: Output length limits
controls.description: Enforce maximum output length to prevent resource exhaustion

references.owasp: LLM02 (Insecure Output Handling), LLM06 (Sensitive Information Disclosure)

controls.title: Prompt Firewall Deployment
controls.description: A dedicated prompt firewall or LLM gateway must be deployed to intercept and filter malicious prompts before they reach the model.

controls.title: Semantic Prompt Filtering
controls.description: Beyond keyword-based filtering, semantic analysis must detect injection intent even when obfuscated or paraphrased.

controls.title: Jailbreak detection system
controls.description: Deploy automated detection of jailbreak attempts

controls.title: RAG Security Controls
controls.description: RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems must implement controls to prevent indirect prompt injection through retrieved documents.

controls.title: Embedding-Level Anomaly Detection
controls.description: Detect prompt injection attempts by analyzing embedding-level anomalies in input text.

controls.title: Agentic workflow authorization
controls.description: Gate all tool/API invocations behind explicit authorization checks

controls.title: Tool/Plugin Isolation Sandbox
controls.description: External tool calls and plugin invocations must be sandboxed to prevent abuse via prompt injection.

controls.title: Continuous red teaming pipeline
controls.description: Maintain automated red team testing for LLM vulnerabilities

controls.title: Human override mechanisms
controls.description: Enable human operators to override or halt LLM actions at any time

controls.title: Multi-turn attack detection
controls.description: Detect gradual instruction drift across multi-turn conversations

controls.title: Adversarial Robustness Testing
controls.description: Models must be tested against common adversarial attack methods (FGSM, PGD for white-box; HopSkipJump, Boundary Attack for black-box).

controls.title: Input Perturbation Limits
controls.description: Models must define and enforce maximum allowed input perturbation boundaries.

controls.title: Model Input Validation
controls.description: All inputs to the model must be validated against expected ranges, types, and formats before inference.

controls.title: Output confidence calibration
controls.description: Limit precision of output confidence scores to reduce information leakage

controls.title: API rate limiting
controls.description: Enforce per-user query quotas to prevent bulk extraction

controls.title: Access control on model endpoints
controls.description: Require authentication for all model inference endpoints

controls.title: Model versioning
controls.description: Maintain versioned model registry with immutable history

controls.title: Model signing
controls.description: Cryptographically sign model artifacts to detect tampering

controls.title: Inference logging
controls.description: Log inference requests with anonymized identifiers for audit

controls.title: Reward Function Robustness
controls.description: RL reward functions must be validated for robustness against unintended optimization. The reward function should be analyzed for potential loopholes that allow the agent to achieve high reward without performing the intended task.

controls.title: Output sanitization
controls.description: Sanitize model outputs to prevent training data reconstruction

controls.title: Adversarial Policy Robustness
controls.description: RL policies must be robust to adversarial perturbations of observations, actions, and policy parameters. Small perturbations should not cause catastrophic behavioral changes.

controls.title: Model behavior monitoring
controls.description: Monitor model behavior for anomalous patterns indicating attacks

controls.title: Secure model serialization
controls.description: Use safe serialization formats (SafeTensors preferred over Pickle)

controls.title: Model rollback capability
controls.description: Enable rapid rollback to previous model versions

controls.title: Certified Adversarial Robustness
controls.description: For high-security models, certified (provable) robustness bounds must be established using methods like randomized smoothing or Lipschitz-based certification.

controls.title: Extraction resistance validation
controls.description: Verify that surrogate models cannot achieve high fidelity through API queries

controls.title: Differential privacy in model
controls.description: Implement differential privacy guarantees in model training

controls.title: Membership inference prevention
controls.description: Prevent adversaries from determining if specific records were in training data

controls.title: Backdoor detection validation
controls.description: Validate that models pass backdoor detection analysis

controls.title: Trojan detection
controls.description: Detect trojan triggers using activation clustering and trigger inversion

controls.title: Model watermarking
controls.description: Embed unique fingerprints in model outputs for forensic tracing

controls.title: Adversarial Training Validation
controls.description: Models trained for sensitive applications must incorporate adversarial training as a defense mechanism.

controls.title: Red Team Exercise Completion
controls.description: Regular adversarial red team exercises must be conducted against the model by independent security teams.

controls.title: Continuous Adversarial Retesting
controls.description: Models must be continuously tested against new adversarial attack methods in a CI/CD pipeline.

controls.title: Model provenance attestation
controls.description: Attest model origin, training process, and chain of custody

controls.title: ML Pipeline Access Control
controls.description: Access to ML pipelines must be authenticated and authorized.

controls.title: Pipeline Artifact Signing
controls.description: All ML artifacts produced by pipelines must be signed.

controls.title: Experiment Tracking Access Control
controls.description: Experiment tracking systems must enforce access control.

controls.title: Training Environment Isolation
controls.description: Training environments must be isolated from other systems.

controls.title: Pipeline Secret Management
controls.description: Secrets used in ML pipelines must be managed securely.

controls.title: Run History Audit Logging
controls.description: All pipeline runs must be logged with immutable audit trails.

controls.title: Feature Store Access Control
controls.description: Feature stores must enforce access control.

controls.title: Model Registry Authentication
controls.description: Model registry must require authentication.

controls.title: Deployment Approval Workflow
controls.description: Model deployments must require approval.

controls.title: Model Deployment Rollback
controls.description: Registry must support rollback to previous model versions.

controls.title: Pipeline Integrity Monitoring
controls.description: Pipeline configurations must be monitored for unauthorized changes.

controls.title: Automated Pipeline Security Scanning
controls.description: Pipelines must include automated security scanning steps.

controls.title: Immutable Model Registry
controls.description: Model registry entries should be immutable once published.

controls.title: Reproducible Training Verification
controls.description: Pipeline must support reproducible training with deterministic results.

controls.title: Data Leakage Prevention in Pipeline
controls.description: Pipelines must prevent data leakage between stages and environments.

controls.title: Cross-tenant Isolation in ML Platforms
controls.description: Multi-tenant ML platforms must enforce tenant isolation.

controls.title: Pipeline Compliance Attestation
controls.description: Pipelines must produce compliance attestation artifacts.

controls.title: Feature Store Data Integrity
controls.description: Feature stores must ensure data integrity and provenance.

controls.title: Canary Deployment for Models
controls.description: New model versions should support canary/shadow deployment.

controls.title: Automated Testing Gate in CI/CD
controls.description: Security tests must gate deployments in CI/CD.

controls.title: ML-SBOM Generation
controls.description: A complete ML-SBOM must be generated for each model, covering model metadata, base models, training datasets, framework dependencies, and training environment.

controls.title: Pre-trained Model Origin Verification
controls.description: Origin and authenticity of all pre-trained models must be verified.

controls.title: Training Dataset Provenance
controls.description: Each training dataset must have documented provenance including source URL, collection date, license, and responsible party.

controls.title: ML Library Version Tracking
controls.description: All ML libraries and frameworks used in training and inference must be tracked with specific versions in the ML-SBOM.

controls.title: License Compliance Check
controls.description: All ML components must be checked for license compliance before use.

controls.title: Model Hash Verification at Load
controls.description: Cryptographic hashes must be verified when loading pre-trained models.

controls.title: Transfer Learning Source Validation
controls.description: Source models used for transfer learning must be validated for security.

controls.title: Dataset License Verification
controls.description: Dataset licenses must be verified and documented to ensure compliance with usage terms.

controls.title: Base Model Vulnerability Scanning
controls.description: Pre-trained models must be scanned for known vulnerabilities.

controls.title: ML Dependency Scanning
controls.description: ML libraries and dependencies must be scanned for known vulnerabilities using standard security scanners.

controls.title: Secure Model Distribution Channels
controls.description: Models must be distributed through secure, authenticated channels.

controls.title: Third-Party Model Evaluation Report
controls.description: Comprehensive security evaluation reports must exist for third-party models.

controls.title: Automated ML-SBOM Generation in CI/CD
controls.description: ML-SBOM must be automatically generated as part of the CI/CD pipeline and updated on each model version.

controls.title: Continuous Dependency Monitoring
controls.description: ML dependencies must be continuously monitored for newly discovered vulnerabilities.

controls.title: Cryptographic Model Provenance
controls.description: Full cryptographic provenance using signed manifests for all models.

controls.title: Model Signing and Attestation
controls.description: Models must be cryptographically signed and attested before deployment.

controls.title: Fine-tuning Data Provenance Chain
controls.description: For fine-tuned models, the provenance chain must extend from base model through all fine-tuning datasets.

controls.title: Adversarial Robustness of Base Model
controls.description: Base models must undergo adversarial robustness evaluation.

controls.title: Backdoor Scanning of Pre-trained Models
controls.description: Pre-trained models must be scanned for potential backdoors.

controls.title: Vendor Security Assessment Program
controls.description: Third-party ML model vendors must undergo security assessment.

controls.title: ML Supply Chain Incident Response
controls.description: An incident response plan specifically addressing ML supply chain compromises must exist and be tested.

controls.title: Reproducible Build Verification
controls.description: Model builds must be reproducible from source to verify integrity.
